title: Hexforge Arena
desc: A real-time top-down PvP fighting game built in bare-metal C on the DE1-SoC, with no OS or graphics libraries. Directly interfaces with memory-mapped VGA for all rendering, with a dynamic zoom camera system and class-based combat mechanics.
bullets: Implemented memory-mapped VGA rendering pipeline from scratch in bare-metal C, writing pixels directly to the VGA buffer with no OS or graphics libraries.
Built a dynamic camera system that tracks both players and adjusts zoom based on their distance, using nearest-neighbor sampling for manual pixel scaling during VGA writes.
Designed class-based combat (Warrior and Sorceress) with distinct attack types, animation state machines, hit detection, and timing — all coordinated within a single real-time loop.
Managed real-time input handling, animation timing, collision detection, and system synchronization simultaneously under strict bare-metal constraints.
note: Full source code withheld per UofT academic integrity policy. Demo and system overview available via GitHub.

title: Embedded Radio Controller
desc: Full embedded system PCB designed from schematic to Gerbers in Altium Designer. Integrates a microcontroller with I²C, UART, and JTAG peripherals across a dual-layer board.
bullets: Integrated SI5351 programmable clock generator and OLED display via I²C bus.
Exposed JTAG debug port and UART interface for firmware development and in-circuit testing.
Designed decoupling network (C1–C4), reset circuitry, and GPIO expansion headers.
Routed dual-layer board with copper fills, via stitching, and signal-integrity considerations for clock lines.

title: Wayout — FPGA First-Person Maze Game
desc: Real-time pseudo-3D maze game on DE1-SoC, built in Verilog with a full VGA graphics pipeline and FSM-driven game logic — delivered over a 3-week sprint.
bullets: Designed clock dividers, pixel-timing generators, and VGA sync logic for stable 60 Hz output.
FSM control logic with shift registers for player movement, wall detection, and state transitions.
Verified with ModelSim waveform analysis and cycle-accurate simulation for collision accuracy.

title: 5-Stage CPU Pipeline Simulator
desc: Cycle-accurate software model of a 5-stage RISC pipeline with RAW hazard detection, stall injection, and per-cycle performance analytics.
bullets: Modeled IF/ID/EX/MEM/WB stages with instruction retirement and pipeline drain behavior.
Implemented RAW data hazard detection and stall insertion logic to simulate pipeline bubbles.
Computed CPI, stall rate, and stage occupancy; visualized pipeline behavior with Matplotlib.
